name: ComponentCommands
summary: Graphisoft official 'Component Commands' command group — 2 JSON-RPC commands (Archicad 29.0).

methods.name: GetComponentsOfElements
methods.summary: Returns the identifier of every component for a list of elements. The order of the returned list is the same as the given elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: componentsOfElements.

methods.name: GetPropertyValuesOfElementComponents
methods.summary: Returns the property values of the components for the given property.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyValuesForElementComponents.
